summary: FII/DII Activity section bug fix verified. All 3 reported issues are fixed: (1) Badge now shows '+12.8K lots' format instead of old '₹128Cr Net' crore format. (2) Label shows 'NSE F&O' (not 'NSE Live'). (3) Table has overflow-x-auto for horizontal scroll on small screens. Backend: 9/9 FII-specific tests pass. Frontend: All UI checks pass via Playwright.

issues: Signal column partially hidden at right edge on 1920px (last column DII NET IDX cut off) — expected behavior as overflow-x-auto requires horizontal scroll; not a bug, works as designed

critical_code_review_comments: FII_LOGIC_ROWS static educational table (lines 571-576 in MarketIntelPanel.jsx) still shows '₹2000 Cr+' labels — this is intentional static educational content about equity FII crore thresholds, different from F&O contracts. No change needed, but may confuse users who see both crore labels (static) and contract numbers (live data) in the same section.
fmtCHead in FiiSection uses `v >= 0 ? '+' : ''` which correctly handles the badge. No issues with zero value edge case.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 FII tests + all previous 14 market-intel tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All FII section UI checks pass

test_results_detail.contracts_format: PASS - fii.buy=22637, sell=9811, net=12826 (contract numbers, not crore decimals)
test_results_detail.history_3_entries: PASS - history array has exactly 3 entries
test_results_detail.history_structure: PASS - all entries have date, fii, dii, classification
test_results_detail.nse_fo_label: PASS - 'NSE F&O' label shown in header (not 'NSE Live')
test_results_detail.history_table_columns: PASS - Date, FII Long, FII Short, FII Net Idx, DII Long, DII Short, DII Net Idx, Signal columns all present
test_results_detail.history_table_values: PASS - Contract numbers: 22,637 / 9,811 / +12,826 etc (not crore values)
test_results_detail.no_rupee_sign_data: PASS - No ₹ sign in actual FII/DII data rows
test_results_detail.overflow_x_auto: PASS - overflow-x-auto present on table wrapper for horizontal scroll
test_results_detail.toggle_working: PASS - FII section expands/collapses on button click
test_results_detail.classification_valid: PASS - classification.action='Moderate Buying' (valid F&O contract threshold)

context_for_next_testing_agent: FII/DII section fully working. Access: click newspaper icon (data-testid='news-btn') in top bar to open Market Intel panel. FII toggle button: data-testid='fii-section-toggle'. Panel uses overflow-y-auto scroll so must scroll down to see FII section. All 3 bug fixes confirmed: lots format badge, NSE F&O label, overflow-x-auto on history table. Previous tests in /app/backend/tests/test_market_intel.py (14 tests) and new /app/backend/tests/test_fii_fix.py (9 tests).
